system.flavor: You let a portion of the deep ocean manifest, a roiling black sea.
system.effect:
Zone a cross 1 roiling bubble of black water in free space in range, with the following effects:
• Yourself and allies have phasing in the area.
• The center space is an obscured space
• Once a round, when a character of your choice starts a voluntary movement is pushed or pulled in the area, they are buffeted by a wave and increase it by +2.
